g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Gmail API integration fetch DBS bank alerts?')
sendPrompt('How does fetch_emails query Gmail for DBS transaction alerts?')
sendPrompt('How does load_to_lake save raw email JSON to S3?')
sendPrompt('How does parse_emails extract transaction fields using regex?')
sendPrompt('What does the S3 raw layer store?')
sendPrompt('How does load_to_warehouse deduplicate and write Parquet files?')
sendPrompt('What does the S3 warehouse layer store?')
sendPrompt('How does generate_dashboard use DuckDB to aggregate metrics?')
sendPrompt('What does the S3 dashboard layer contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the Streamlit dashboard display expense data?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI widget API serve data to the iPhone?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit expense dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does the iPhone Scriptable widget display expenses?')
